72921d97-21d1-47e1-a17f-3f16e49538a7.title: The Sacred Life of a Webcomic Artist
72921d97-21d1-47e1-a17f-3f16e49538a7.author: Jooya
72921d97-21d1-47e1-a17f-3f16e49538a7.description: Imagine you were a once-famous adult webcomic artist going through a career slump. Would you rather work with your stunningly sexy but jerk of a producer, Jooho, or your first love and story writer, Minjoon? Well, Hayoon has to work with both! With bills to pay and nothing but ramyun to eat after a string of failed series, Hayoon must successfully launch a new title with both of them on her team. Will she be able to navigate this professional nightmare and revive her career with a bang? And which man will end up taking the spot of her male lead?

e5eb4105-1b15-41d1-b455-5ee39977414f.title: Plaything
e5eb4105-1b15-41d1-b455-5ee39977414f.author: Q-Boy
e5eb4105-1b15-41d1-b455-5ee39977414f.description: Lee Myung-jun, Wakil Ketua Grup Hyun-do, kehilangan putrinya karena sekelompok pembully. Untuk membalas dendam, dia mengadopsi Yoon Karma, seorang gadis pembelot psikopat. Yoon Karma: Senjata manusia sadis yang diciptakan melalui eksperimen narkoba di Korea Utara. Setelah membunuh semua orang di laboratorium penelitian, dia melarikan diri ke Korea Selatan sendirian. Baru saja dibebaskan dari pusat penahanan remaja di Korea Selatan, Yoon Karma bertekad memburu para pembully di sekolah, didorong oleh keinginan untuk membalaskan dendam ayah barunya dan memuaskan kesenangan sadisnya.

59cfe5bf-f5cf-446d-b02e-e83cca8fffcc.title: The Hip Guy
59cfe5bf-f5cf-446d-b02e-e83cca8fffcc.author: Henie
59cfe5bf-f5cf-446d-b02e-e83cca8fffcc.description: 27-year-old Ga-eun Seong has everything that money can buy, but she can’t rest until her athleisure company is the best in the industry. That’s why she hires Chan Gwak to model her new leggings line for men. Chan has the perfect butt, but is it perfect enough to meet Ga-eun's high standards? After social media interactions have people thinking they’re dating, Ga-eun begins to question... even though Chan’s not her type, could she end up falling for him anyway?

47817452-70cf-4590-9901-05fa0c717397.title: Unholy Blood
47817452-70cf-4590-9901-05fa0c717397.author: KIM Jung-Hyun, LIM Lina
47817452-70cf-4590-9901-05fa0c717397.description: When vampires destroy her chance to have the normal life she’s always wanted, Hayan is forced to draw on her darkest secret to rid the world of the merciless hunters that took it over 10 years ago. With the support of a rising star in the local police force, Hayan steps up to protect her loved ones, face her past, and get her revenge.
